name: comfyui
description: ComfyUI — generate images using your local ComfyUI server and custom workflows
author: sapphire

settings.label: Default Workflow
settings.help: Filename (without .json) of the default workflow. Leave empty to use the first one alphabetically.

settings.label: Poll Interval (seconds)
settings.help: How often to check if generation is complete

settings.label: Timeout (seconds)
settings.help: Maximum time to wait for image generation
